headline: Used Tesla For $25,000
summary: A new Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) Model 3 with All-Wheel Drive has a base price of just $50,000. A similarly featured Model Y costs about the same. Each is priced below the industry average for a new EV, which is $60,000. One of the barriers to EV adoption in the US is price. Tesla has begun ... Used Tesla For $25,000

headline: GM's most and least selling vehicles in the first quarter
summary: Pickups and SUVs drove first quarter 2026 sales for the Detroit-based General Motors. But overall sales fell nearly 10% for the quarter.

raw.headline: GM's most and least selling vehicles in the first quarter

headline: Trump tariff fallout: Some industries grapple with lingering effects one year later
summary: A year after his "liberation day," Trump's trade war has reshaped how companies in industries such as retail and autos are modeling economic and policy risk.

raw.headline: Trump tariff fallout: Some industries grapple with lingering effects one year later
raw.summary: A year after his "liberation day," Trump's trade war has reshaped how companies in industries such as retail and autos are modeling economic and policy risk.

headline: LG Energy Solution Becomes First Battery Company to Join SDVerse, Global B2B Marketplace for Automotive Software
summary: LG Energy Solution announced today that it has joined SDVerse, becoming the first battery company to participate. This move underscores the company's technological leadership as it expands beyond battery manufacturing into the software and services that power next-generation vehicles.
